docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED OCT-23-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CUADRA-REYES, LUZLUNIA
REMARK:ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT UPDATED TO REFLECT THE CORRECT APT. NUMER FROM #610 TO APT 612 AS REFLECTED IN PLAINTIFF'S PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 11-9-22. (IN COURT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2022 - JUDGMENT. TEKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 11-18-22)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLIAS-MARTINIS, KEZIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUADRA-REYES, LUZLUNIA $220.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $335.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $520.00 FILED BY VILLIAS-MARTINIS, KEZIA AS TO DEFENDANT CUADRA-REYES, LUZLUNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLIAS-MARTINIS, KEZIA AS TO DEFENDANT CUADRA-REYES, LUZLUNIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KEZIA VILLIAS-MARTINIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUZLUNIA CAUDRA-REYES IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
